member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Api.JellyTubbingController
member.summary: REST API endpoints for the JellyTubbing plugin.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Api.JellyTubbingController.#ctor(Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.OAuthService,Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.YouTubeApiService,Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.StreamResolverService,Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.SyncBackgroundService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Api.JellyTubbingController.GetUiScript
member.summary: Serves the embedded configuration page JavaScript.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Api.JellyTubbingController.CheckTools
member.summary: Checks whether yt-dlp is available on the server.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Api.JellyTubbingController.GetOAuthUrl
member.summary: Returns the Google OAuth2 authorization URL for the config page popup.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Api.JellyTubbingController.OAuthCallback(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Handles the Google OAuth2 callback. Exchanges the authorization code for tokens and returns an HTML page that closes the popup and notifies the opener.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Api.JellyTubbingController.GetOAuthStatus
member.summary: Returns the current OAuth authorization status.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Api.JellyTubbingController.RevokeOAuth
member.summary: Revokes the stored OAuth tokens.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Api.JellyTubbingController.GetSubscriptions(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the user's YouTube subscriptions (requires OAuth).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Api.JellyTubbingController.TriggerSync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Triggers an immediate sync of all configured channels.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Api.JellyTubbingController.StreamVideo(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resolves a YouTube video ID to a direct stream URL and returns a 302 redirect. Used by the .strm files generated for subscribed channels.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Channel.JellyTubbingChannel
member.summary: Jellyfin channel that shows YouTube trending videos via the YouTube Data API. Subscribed channels are synced separately as STRM files via .

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Channel.JellyTubbingChannel.#ctor(Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.YouTubeApiService,Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.StreamResolverService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Configuration.PluginConfiguration
member.summary: Configuration for JellyTubbing plugin.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.YouTubeApiKey
member.summary: Gets or sets the YouTube Data API v3 key (required for trending and channel videos).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.OAuthClientId
member.summary: Gets or sets the OAuth2 client ID from Google Cloud Console.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.OAuthClientSecret
member.summary: Gets or sets the OAuth2 client secret from Google Cloud Console.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.OAuthAccessToken
member.summary: Gets or sets the stored OAuth2 access token.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.OAuthRefreshToken
member.summary: Gets or sets the stored OAuth2 refresh token.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.OAuthTokenExpiryUnix
member.summary: Gets or sets the expiry of the access token as Unix timestamp (seconds).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.StrmOutputPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the output folder for STRM/NFO/thumbnail files.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.JellyfinServerUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the Jellyfin server base URL used inside STRM files.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.SyncedChannelIds
member.summary: Gets or sets the channel IDs to synchronise as STRM files.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.SyncIntervalHours
member.summary: Gets or sets how often (hours) the background sync runs.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.MaxVideosPerChannel
member.summary: Gets or sets maximum number of videos to sync per channel.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.YtDlpBinaryPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional path to the yt-dlp binary.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.PreferredQuality
member.summary: Gets or sets the preferred stream quality (360p, 480p, 720p, 1080p).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.TrendingRegion
member.summary: Gets or sets the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 region code for trending videos (e.g. DE, US).

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Models.YouTubeVideoListResponse
member.summary: YouTube Data API v3 – videos.list response.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Models.YouTubeVideoItem
member.summary: A single video item from the YouTube Data API.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Models.YouTubeVideoSnippet
member.summary: Snippet block of a YouTube video.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Models.YouTubeContentDetails
member.summary: Content details block of a YouTube video.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Models.YouTubeContentDetails.Duration
member.summary: ISO 8601 duration string, e.g. PT4M13S.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Models.YouTubeThumbnails
member.summary: Thumbnail variants for a YouTube resource.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Models.YouTubeThumbnails.BestUrl
member.summary: Best available thumbnail URL, highest resolution first.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Models.YouTubeThumbnail
member.summary: A single thumbnail entry.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Models.YouTubeSubscriptionListResponse
member.summary: YouTube Data API v3 – subscriptions.list response.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Models.YouTubeSubscriptionItem
member.summary: A single subscription item.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Models.YouTubeSubscriptionSnippet
member.summary: Snippet of a subscription.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Models.YouTubeResourceId
member.summary: Resource identifier inside a subscription snippet.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Models.YouTubeSearchListResponse
member.summary: YouTube Data API v3 – search.list response.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Models.YouTubeSearchItem
member.summary: A single search result item.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Models.YouTubeSearchItemId
member.summary: The id block of a search result.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Models.OAuthTokenResponse
member.summary: Google OAuth2 token response.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Plugin
member.summary: JellyTubbing plugin – stream YouTube videos directly in Jellyfin via Invidious.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Plugin.Instance
member.summary: Gets the singleton instance of this plugin.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Plugin.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths,MediaBrowser.Model.Serialization.IXmlSerializer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.ServiceRegistrator
member.summary: Registers JellyTubbing services with Jellyfin's DI container.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.OAuthService
member.summary: Handles Google OAuth2 authorization code flow for YouTube read-only access.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.OAuthService.#ctor(System.Net.Http.IHttpClientFactory,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.OAuthService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.OAuthService.IsAuthorized
member.summary: Returns true when a (possibly refreshable) token is stored.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.OAuthService.GetAuthorizationUrl(System.String)
member.summary: Builds the Google authorization URL to redirect the user to.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.OAuthService.ExchangeCodeAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Exchanges an authorization code for access + refresh tokens and stores them.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.OAuthService.GetValidAccessTokenAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a valid access token, refreshing if necessary. Returns null if not authorized.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.OAuthService.Revoke
member.summary: Clears all stored OAuth tokens.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.StreamResolverService
member.summary: Resolves a YouTube video ID to a direct stream URL via yt-dlp. Used by the JellyTubbing channel for on-demand trending video playback.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.StreamResolverService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.StreamResolverService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.StreamResolverService.ResolveAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resolves a YouTube video ID to a via yt-dlp.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.StreamResolverService.ResolveUrlAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resolves a YouTube video URL to a direct stream URL string via yt-dlp -g.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.StrmService
member.summary: Creates .strm, .nfo and thumbnail files for YouTube videos in the configured output folder.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.StrmService.#ctor(System.Net.Http.IHttpClientFactory,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.StrmService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.StrmService.CreateVideoFilesAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates .strm / .nfo / thumbnail for a single video if they do not already exist.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.SyncBackgroundService
member.summary: Background service that periodically syncs subscribed YouTube channels to STRM files.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.SyncBackgroundService.#ctor(Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.YouTubeApiService,Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.StrmService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.SyncBackgroundService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.SyncBackgroundService.TriggerSyncAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Triggers a manual sync immediately.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.YouTubeApiService
member.summary: Wraps the YouTube Data API v3 for trending, subscriptions and channel video listing.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.YouTubeApiService.#ctor(System.Net.Http.IHttpClientFactory,Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.OAuthService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.YouTubeApiService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.YouTubeApiService.GetTrendingAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns trending videos for the configured region. Pass a YouTube video category ID (e.g. "10" for Music) or null for all categories.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.YouTubeApiService.GetSubscriptionsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all subscriptions of the authenticated user (paginates automatically).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.JellyTubbing.Services.YouTubeApiService.GetChannelVideosAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the most recent videos from a YouTube channel.
